series_metadata.series_title: Confidential Documents From Formal Case Files
series_metadata.series_description: Filings from the formal docketed case files that are given protective treatment pursuant to Ohio Administrative Code 4901-1-24. Examples of documents involved include testimonies, exhibits, financial statements, cost studies, reports, and other items containing proprietary or sensitive information regarding utility company facilities and operations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in confidential status until 18 months after Motion for Protective Order is granted, or until designated period expires, whichever is greater, then release to formal case files., Paper: Other
